evidence_summary: Show the aftermath of the battle and the ritualistic treatment of the defeated.
An unmanned, damaged ship drifts toward the city. The green warriors use grappling hooks to pull it down, loot it for supplies and weapons, and then set it on fire, creating a drifting funeral pyre.
Wide shots of the grappling process
Low-angle shots of the burning ship drifting away.
